case_title: JAIME O RAMIREZ VS. RYNA JOANNE DANDAN CASTOR

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CASTOR, RYNA JOANNE DANDAN
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. MATTER CONTINUED TO NOV-6-2019 AT 10 AM DEPT. 506. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-11-2019 - CONTINUED FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER TO DEC-18-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JAIME O RAMIREZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RYAN JOANNE DANDAN CASTOR IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PARTIES WERE INFORMED THAT NO FURTHER SERVICE IS REQUIRED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-18-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, JAIME O RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASTOR, RYNA JOANNE DANDAN $1,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,850.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
